summary: Frontend testing iteration 12 - Verified three UI fixes: 1) Visa map colors working for major countries, 2) Weather page legend colors updated (Snow=#E8E8FF light purple, Mild=#90EE90 light green), 3) Seasons page Seasonal Travel Guide shows 8 destination cards with horizontal scroll and arrow button. All 8 test cases PASSED.
passed_tests: TEST 1: Seasons page Sunny & Warm destinations count = 8 cards
TEST 2: Seasons page scroll arrow button visible
TEST 3: Scroll button functionality works (scrolled from 0 to 220)
TEST 4: Seasons page Snow & Winter destinations count = 8 cards
TEST 5: Visa page map and legends visible with correct colors
TEST 6: Weather page Snow/Cold legend color = rgb(232, 232, 255) = #E8E8FF (light purple) - NOT white
TEST 7: Weather page Mild legend color = rgb(144, 238, 144) = #90EE90 (light green) - NOT ocean blue
TEST 8: Weather page December selection works, cold countries return snow weather type
critical_code_review_comments: WorldMap.js lines 141-143: Snow/cold colors correctly set to #E8E8FF (light purple)
WorldMap.js line 141: Mild color correctly set to #90EE90 (light green)
Weather.js lines 241-247: Legend colors match map colors for Snow/Cold (#E8E8FF) and Mild (#90EE90)
Seasons.js lines 928-980: Scrollable destination container with 8 cards per weather type and scroll-right-btn
Visa page country cards correctly show: USA=visa_required(orange), Russia=e_visa(blue), Thailand=visa_on_arrival(red), Maldives=visa_free(green)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All three UI fixes verified working: 1) Visa map has colors for major countries including USA(orange), Russia(blue), Thailand(red), Maldives(green). 2) Weather page legend updated - Snow/Cold is light purple (#E8E8FF) not white, Mild is light green (#90EE90) not ocean blue. 3) Seasons page Seasonal Travel Guide shows 8 destination cards per weather type with horizontal scroll and arrow button that scrolls correctly.
test_screenshots: .screenshots/visa_full_page.png - Visa page with map showing colored countries
.screenshots/visa_country_cards.png - Country cards with correct visa types
.screenshots/weather_page.png - Weather page with updated legend colors
